commands.review_summary:
The PR changes official npm plugin update, onboarding, doctor repair, and legacy migration paths so managed official plugin install records persist exact resolved npm specs while third-party moving specs remain unpinned.

PR surface: Source +140, Tests +366. Total +506 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the audit warns on bare `record.spec`, and the supplied macOS screenshots show the warning before the patch and absent after the patched update path.
